overview: The NNS Technical Review Hub is a decentralized platform for managing and transparently displaying technical reviews of Internet Computer NNS proposals. It features role-based access for admins, reviewers, and public visitors, proposal syncing from the IC dashboard API, reviewer and grant assignment management, vote recommendations (Adopt/Reject), a public audit log of all admin review actions, and an Institutional Minimalist design optimized for desktop and mobile.
features: Proposal management with IC dashboard API sync and topic filtering
Reviewer management with Volunteer, Former Grantee, and Paid Grantee types
Vote recommendation (Adopt/Reject) per review with aggregated proposal-level badges
Admin actions: add/remove/edit reviews on behalf of reviewers with mandatory comments
Public paginated audit log of all admin review actions
Admin-configurable authorized principal for automated proposal submissions
Tabbed reviewer detail pages with Review History, TODOs, and Grant Assignment History
Responsive Institutional Minimalist design with burger menu on mobile
Backend canister downtime detection with user-friendly alerts
